ogTitle: Oaky Creek vs Obi Obi: Climate Safety

heading: Oaky Creek vs Obi Obi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oaky Creek, Queensland and Obi Obi, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oaky Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Obi Obi (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oaky Creek or Obi Obi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oaky Creek has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Obi Obi scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oaky Creek scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Obi Obi scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oaky Creek or Obi Obi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oaky Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
